item.title: LEGO Gear Bots Klutz : Create 8 Machines
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Gear Bots Klutz : Create 8 Machines at the following link: ℹ️: Build your own kinetic sculptures in this fun kit. Add paper-craft characters to the build and watch your new friend come to life! Country of Origin: United States Model number: 9781338603453 🛒 Check the deal!!
